wio_mic_read.tooltip: Read the analog value from Wio Terminal built-in microphone (0~1023). Higher value means louder sound.

wio_mic_is_loud.tooltip: Returns true when the microphone reading exceeds the specified threshold, useful for sound detection

wio_buzzer_on.tooltip: Drive the buzzer via analogWrite. Duty cycle range 0~255 (128 recommended)

wio_buzzer_off.tooltip: Stop analogWrite output and turn off the buzzer

wio_buzzer_tone.tooltip: Continuously play the specified frequency using tone(), until stopped

wio_buzzer_tone_duration.message0: buzzer play frequency %1 Hz for %2 ms
wio_buzzer_tone_duration.tooltip: Play the specified frequency for the given duration using tone(), then stop automatically

wio_buzzer_no_tone.tooltip: Stop tone() output and turn off the buzzer
